Uses of Class
com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity

    • Uses of IF97.Quantity in com.hummeling.if97

      Methods in com.hummeling.if97 that return IF97.Quantity 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static IF97.Quantity IF97.Quantity.valueOf​(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static IF97.Quantity[] IF97.Quantity.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in com.hummeling.if97 that return types with arguments of type IF97.Quantity 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Set<IF97.Quantity> IF97.Quantity.getPartialDerivatives()
      Gets the quantities supported by partial derivatives relations.
      Methods in com.hummeling.if97 with parameters of type IF97.Quantity 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static double IF97.convertFromDefault​(IF97.UnitSystem unitSystem, IF97.Quantity quantity, double value)  
      String IF97.UnitSystem.getLabel​(IF97.Quantity quantity)  
      String IF97.UnitSystem.getUnit​(IF97.Quantity quantity)  
      double IF97.partialDerivativePH​(double pressure, double enthalpy, IF97.Quantity x, IF97.Quantity y, IF97.Quantity z)
      Partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of pressure and specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.partialDerivativePT​(double pressure, double temperature, IF97.Quantity x, IF97.Quantity y, IF97.Quantity z)
      Gets the partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of pressure and temperature.
      double IF97.partialDerivativeRhoT​(double density, double temperature, IF97.Quantity x, IF97.Quantity y, IF97.Quantity z)
      Gets the partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of density and temperature, valid in region 3 only!
